summary: Iteration 18 testing for 3 features: Demo P0 fix, PDF export before submit, Excel export/import. All backend API tests PASS (7/7). Two frontend issues found and one fixed.

ui_bugs.issue: AssessmentV2Taking.jsx (with new PDF/Excel/Import buttons) is NOT registered in App.js routing. The route /portal/assessments/:sessionId uses the OLD AssessmentTaking.jsx which only has PDF (with old token-based export endpoint). Excel and Import buttons are unreachable by users.

handleExportPdf uses old endpoint `/api/assessment/${session.token}/export` instead of new `/api/assessment/sessions/${sessionId}/export-pdf`. Will fail for draft sessions if the token-based route still requires submitted status.

action_items: Wire AssessmentV2Taking.jsx to App.js: either replace `import AssessmentTaking` with `AssessmentV2Taking` for the route `/portal/assessments/:sessionId`, OR add a separate route for staff/admin. This is critical — without this, the new Excel export/import and improved PDF buttons are completely invisible to users.

Update handleExportPdf in AssessmentTaking.jsx to use the new `/api/assessment/sessions/${sessionId}/export-pdf` endpoint (auth-based, works for draft and submitted) instead of the old token-based export.
critical_code_review_comments: AssessmentV2Taking.jsx exists at /app/frontend/src/features/assessment/AssessmentV2Taking.jsx but is NEVER imported or used in App.js — dead code that needs to be wired up
DemoConfigPage.jsx was calling /admin/cases (404) instead of /admin/cms/cases — FIXED in this iteration

success_rate.frontend: 50% (DemoConfigPage API fix done; AssessmentV2Taking not wired to route)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for PDF export (before/after submit), Excel export, Excel import all work correctly. DemoConfigPage API fixed. Main outstanding issue: AssessmentV2Taking.jsx is not connected to any route - main agent needs to update App.js. Session IDs: draft=fe7b000b-5915-4064-9e10-3f4adb922ceb, submitted=912ff0c5-41d4-458d-b4dc-d7cefd35561f. Admin: admin@kubus.id / Admin#2026.
rca_of_issue: AssessmentV2Taking.jsx was created as a replacement/upgrade for AssessmentTaking.jsx but was never connected in App.js. The lazy import and Route entry for /portal/assessments/:sessionId still points to the old AssessmentTaking. Fix: in App.js, change line 78 from `import('@/features/portal/client/AssessmentTaking')` to `import('@/features/assessment/AssessmentV2Taking')` OR update AssessmentTaking.jsx to include the new Excel/Import buttons.
